deviations.description: The new requirement in Version 2 obligates assessment only if the donor is still bleeding after 20 minutes, whereas the process model enforces assessment after 15 minutes if the donor is still bleeding or experiencing pain. The process does not wait for 20 minutes and also considers pain, which is no longer required. This results in a violation of the stricter timing and condition in Version 2.
process_model_reference: Patient Monitoring, Event based gateway to ensure time requirement, Assess donor

deviations.description: The process model continues to require assessment and recording the reason in the system if the donor is still bleeding or experiencing pain after 15 minutes, which is no longer required in Version 2. This enforces outdated constraints and unnecessary actions.
The process model obligates recording the reason in the system, which has been removed in Version 2. This results in unnecessary documentation.
